reasoning: After a significant public feud in June and July 2025 involving policy disagreements and personal attacks on social media, Elon Musk and Donald Trump reconciled in the fall. By late October 2025, multiple news reports confirmed that their relationship was "on the mend" after they reconnected at a funeral in September. On October 27-28, Trump publicly stated on Air Force One that their relationship is "good" and that he suspects he'll "always like" Musk. No further conflicts emerged prior to the November 9, 2025 knowledge cutoff. The Manifold market consensus was 0.83 just ten days before the cutoff. While their history of volatility and the remaining seven weeks of the year leave a 15-20% chance of a renewed falling-out, the recent active reconciliation strongly supports a "YES" resolution. I conservatively adjust slightly below the market estimate to 0.81 factoring in the high volatility of both personalities.
